strengths: Clearly identifies three distinct, concrete objects with specific real-world contexts (laptop, phone GPS, home router).
Makes explicit links between each object and the chosen IA prompt through historical comparisons, supported by multiple factual references.
Uses structured labeling and a clear title panel, enhancing the organization and clarity of the exhibition.
Provides evidence and a short reference list, showing engagement with supporting material.
weaknesses: Analysis remains largely descriptive and technology-historical rather than focused on TOK concepts (methodology, reliability, perspective).
Explanations can be repetitive across objects and occasionally lack precision or clarity in relating to the promptâs epistemological focus.
Citation formatting is inconsistent and incomplete, undermining scholarly rigor.
Conclusion is overly general and fails to synthesize insights from each object back to specific TOK ideas.
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The examinerâs strand assessment places the work solidly in the 5â6 band: the student demonstrates clear identification of objects, contexts and links to the prompt, with supporting evidence and some justification. However, the analysis lacks consistent precision, depth of TOK conceptual engagement and citation rigor needed for higher bands. Awarding a score of 6 reflects the moderate but uneven quality of the submissionârecognizing its clear structure and use of evidence while noting the need for sharper epistemological analysis, more precise argumentation and improved scholarly presentation.

annotations.comment: The introduction frames the prompt but remains abstract and lacks explicit TOK concepts such as methodology or reliability. Deepen the epistemological focus to clarify how these concepts underpin your argument.
The student clearly states the prompt and theme in the title panel, demonstrating an organized start and contextual awareness of the TOK exhibition structure.
Consider mapping your chosen themes of comparison, evolution and reflection to specific TOK terminology and definitions to strengthen conceptual clarity.
The description of the laptopâs function is generic and lacks a specific real-world scenario or model; specify where and how you use this device to ground your context.
The technical historical comparison with Babbageâs engine is detailed but remains descriptive; it lacks analytical depth in linking to the promptâs epistemological focus.
Deepen the analysis by explicitly linking architectural evolution to TOK concepts like reliability, scope or perspective to enhance your justification.
This sentence is unfinished and disrupts the flow of analysis; ensure each paragraph concludes a coherent point before moving on.
Contrasting compressed laptop hardware with earlier bulky machines shows an understanding of technological progress and serves as strong supporting evidence.
The opening discussion repeats earlier points and lacks fresh insight; consider focusing on a single novel angle per paragraph.
Explicitly state how compressed architecture affects knowledge accessibility or reliability to tie this evidence back to the TOK prompt.
Add a clear caption under the router image specifying device model and source to strengthen the real-world context.
The router description begins with a fragment; develop a complete explanation of its role in network traffic to ensure clarity.
The detailed account of early networking milestones offers strong justifications and evidence for your objectâs significance.
Strengthen your epistemological analysis by discussing how protocol evolution influences the validity and reliability of network knowledge.
The concluding reflection is overly general and does not revisit each objectâs insight; tie back to specific examples to reinforce your exploration of improvement.
Synthesize insights from all three objects in your conclusion to clearly show how each contributes to understanding knowledge improvement.
The second object is clearly labelled, helping the reader follow the exhibitionâs structure and ensuring each object is distinct.
The figure caption is detached and unclear; integrate it directly beneath the image with a clear description and source.
Specify your GPS device model or usage scenario to ground the context and make the real-world link more concrete.
This concluding sentence is vague and does not specify concrete epistemic gains; relate it directly to how GPS evolution informs our understanding of knowledge improvement.
The third object header is clearly labelled, maintaining consistency in structure and helping to delineate your exhibitionâs components.
Could you clarify how âreflectionâ as a TOK concept is distinctively applied across each object rather than treated as a general term?
The reference entries lack consistent formatting and are incomplete; adopt a standardized citation style (e.g., MLA, APA) to improve credibility.
Include publication and access dates for online sources to ensure clarity and to strengthen the scholarly rigor of your evidence.
The last reference URL is truncated, which undermines the sourceâs reliability; ensure full links are provided in each citation.
Consider merging related URL fragments into single comprehensive entries to improve readability and coherence.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

strands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
strands.content: The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.
